description: FindTfSitesAlteredBySequenceVariation reports the effects of all possible in silico single-nucleotide variants (SNVs) in a given sequence, for one transcription factor. Possible SNV effects include increasing (or optimizing) the affinity/score of a binding site, decreasing the affinity/score of a binding site, deleting a binding site, or creating a binding site.
author: Joe Solvasson, modified into a GenePattern module as Ted Liefeld
plan:
## tfsites.FindTfSitesAlteredBySequenceVariation GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
tfsites.FindTfSitesAlteredBySequenceVariation is a GenePattern module that FindTfSitesAlteredBySequenceVariation reports the effects of all possible in silico single-nucleotide variants (SNVs) in a given sequence, for one transcription factor. Possible SNV effects include increasing (or optimizing) the affinity/score of a binding site, decreasing the affinity/score of a binding site, deleting a binding site, or creating a binding site.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 19 parameters:
- Required: DNA.sequences.to.annotate, TF.name, output.filename, PWM.minimum.score, output.image.as.svg, affinity.optimization.threshold, affinity.reduction.threshold, plot.resolution
- Optional: core.binding.site.definition, affinity.reference.data, PWM.data, SNV.effect.type.to.report, zoom.range, motif.input.file, motif.input.format, motif.filter.keywords, motif.use.pseudocounts, motif.background.frequencies, motif.output.name

### 3. Command Line
```
python /build/tfsites-webportal/04-findTfSitesAlteredBySequenceVariation/04-combined-generateMotifDatabase-and-findTfSitesAlteredBySequenceVariation.py  -d <DNA.sequences.to.annotate> <affinity.reference.data>  <PWM.data>  <PWM.minimum.score>    <SNV.effect.type.to.report> <affinity.optimization.threshold> <affinity.reduction.threshold> <output.image.as.svg> <zoom.range> <plot.resolution> -n <TF.name> <core.binding.site.definition>  --output_name  <output.filename> <motif.input.file> <motif.input.format> <motif.use.pseudocounts> <motif.filter.keywords> <motif.use.pseudocounts> <motif.background.frequencies> <motif.output.name>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/tfsites\:17.0.16

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: DNA.sequences.to.annotate
parameters.description: File containing one or more DNA sequences to be annotated.

parameters.name: TF.name
parameters.description: Name of the transcription factor to use for SNV analysis.

parameters.name: core.binding.site.definition
parameters.description: IUPAC definition of core TF binding site (see here). Only optional if using PWM data but required if using affinity data.

parameters.name: affinity.reference.data
parameters.description: PBM affinity dataset used to assign a value to each binding site.

parameters.name: PWM.data
parameters.description: PWM dataset used to assign a value to each binding site.

parameters.name: PWM.minimum.score
parameters.description: PWM score required to predict a binding site.

parameters.name: output.image.as.svg
parameters.description: Option to output images as .svg in addition to .png. For manuscript preparation, .svg format is preferable.

parameters.name: SNV.effect.type.to.report
parameters.description: Specify one or more mutation types to analyze. SNV mutations can either increase (optimize) or decrease (sub-optimize) the affinity/score, delete a binding site, or create a binding site. Therefore, the possible mutation types are 'inc', 'dec', 'denovo', and 'del.' This option also takes the value 'all' if the user would like to analyze all of the listed mutation types.

parameters.name: affinity.optimization.threshold
parameters.description: Fold change threshold for mutations that increase the affinity/score. Only SNVs with fold change above this threshold will be reported. By default, all SNVs will be reported.

parameters.name: affinity.reduction.threshold
parameters.description: Fold change threshold for mutations that decrease the affinity/score. Only SNVs with fold change below this threshold will be reported. By default, all SNVs will be reported.

parameters.name: plot.resolution
parameters.description: Resolution of the plot, in dots (pixels) per inch.

parameters.name: zoom.range
parameters.description: Given a start position and an end position, zoom into a portion of the sequence. The numbers in the range are inclusive and 0-indexed. For example, the first 200 nucleotides of the sequence would be specified as\: 0-199.

parameters.name: motif.input.file
parameters.description: File containing matrix data for motif database generation (JASPAR format). If provided, motif database will be generated first.

parameters.name: motif.input.format
parameters.description: Specify whether input file contains PFMs or PWMs. Required if motif input file is provided.

parameters.name: motif.filter.keywords
parameters.description: File containing keywords to filter motifs during database generation.

parameters.name: motif.use.pseudocounts
parameters.description: Whether to use pseudocounts when generating motif database.

parameters.name: motif.background.frequencies
parameters.description: Background frequency for each nucleotide (comma-separated string in order of ATCG).

parameters.name: motif.output.name
parameters.description: Name of motif database output file. If not specified, temporary file will be created.
